languages.text: "И Владыка Галактики услышал нас и смилостивился! И направил разведчиков прямиком в заброшенный отсек, полный припасов. Ибо тому, кто истинно верует и смиренно ждет, да воздастся!"

traits.locale_text: "И Владыка Галактики услышал нас и смилостивился! И направил разведчиков прямиком в заброшенный отсек, полный припасов. Ибо тому, кто истинно верует и смиренно ждет, да воздастся!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "И Владыка Галактики услышал нас и смилостивился! И направил разведчиков прямиком в заброшенный отсек, полный припасов. Ибо тому, кто истинно верует и смиренно ждет, да воздастся!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "And the Lord of the Galaxy heard us and showed mercy! And he led the scouts straight into an abandoned chamber, full of supplies. Blessed are those who are strong in faith and stalwart in patience!"
languages.original_text: "И Владыка Галактики услышал нас и смилостивился! И направил разведчиков прямиком в заброшенный отсек, полный припасов. Ибо тому, кто истинно верует и смиренно ждет, да воздастся!"

traits.locale_text: "And the Lord of the Galaxy heard us and showed mercy! And he led the scouts straight into an abandoned chamber, full of supplies. Blessed are those who are strong in faith and stalwart in patience!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "And the Lord of the Galaxy heard us and showed mercy! And he led the scouts straight into an abandoned chamber, full of supplies. Blessed are those who are strong in faith and stalwart in patience!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "And the Lord of the Galaxy heard us and showed mercy! And he led the scouts straight into an abandoned chamber, full of supplies. Blessed are those who are strong in faith and stalwart in patience!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "Und der Herr der Galaxis erhörte uns und zeigte Erbarmen! Und er führte die Späher geradewegs in eine verlassene Kammer, die voll mit Vorräten war. Gesegnet sind die, die stark im Glauben und standhaft in der Geduld sind!"
languages.original_text: "And the Lord of the Galaxy heard us and showed mercy! And he led the scouts straight into an abandoned chamber, full of supplies. Blessed are those who are strong in faith and stalwart in patience!"

languages.text: "Le Seigneur de la galaxie nous a entendus et a eu pitié de nous ! Il a conduit les éclaireurs directement dans une chambre abandonnée, pleine de provisions. Heureux ceux qui sont forts dans la foi et robustes dans la patience !"
languages.original_text: "And the Lord of the Galaxy heard us and showed mercy! And he led the scouts straight into an abandoned chamber, full of supplies. Blessed are those who are strong in faith and stalwart in patience!"

languages.text: "银河系之王听到了我们的声音，大发慈悲！他带领侦察兵们直接进入了一间废弃的密室 里面堆满了补给品信仰坚定、坚忍不拔的人有福了！"
languages.original_text: "And the Lord of the Galaxy heard us and showed mercy! And he led the scouts straight into an abandoned chamber, full of supplies. Blessed are those who are strong in faith and stalwart in patience!"

languages.text: "¡Y el Señor de la Galaxia nos escuchó y mostró misericordia! Y condujo a los exploradores directamente a una cámara abandonada, llena de provisiones. ¡Bienaventurados los que son fuertes en la fe e incondicionales en la paciencia!"
languages.original_text: "And the Lord of the Galaxy heard us and showed mercy! And he led the scouts straight into an abandoned chamber, full of supplies. Blessed are those who are strong in faith and stalwart in patience!"

languages.text: 「銀河の主は私たちの声を聞き、慈悲を示された！そして偵察隊を、物資で満たされた廃墟のような部屋へとまっすぐに導かれた。信仰に強く、忍耐強い者は幸いである。
languages.original_text: "And the Lord of the Galaxy heard us and showed mercy! And he led the scouts straight into an abandoned chamber, full of supplies. Blessed are those who are strong in faith and stalwart in patience!"

languages.text: "Ve Galaksinin Efendisi bizi duydu ve merhamet gösterdi! Ve gözcüleri doğruca erzak dolu terk edilmiş bir odaya götürdü. Ne mutlu imanı güçlü ve sabrı sağlam olanlara!"
languages.original_text: "And the Lord of the Galaxy heard us and showed mercy! And he led the scouts straight into an abandoned chamber, full of supplies. Blessed are those who are strong in faith and stalwart in patience!"
